category_sources: source_facts.description says it finds out what takes most of the space in an executable.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cargo-bloat; source_facts.repo path RazrFalcon/cargo-bloat matches the project name.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official repository; its README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; per instructions repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies executable space analysis; source_facts.executables lists cargo-bloat.
